Label: DisclosureOfNotesOnShareholdingPatternExplanatoryTextBlock
Value: <div> <div> <div> </div> <div>For Promoter and Promoter Group'| with respect to Table II'| (1) Indian (d) Any other'| we have classified Niyman Mall Management Company Private Limited as 'Promoter' instead of 'Promoter Group'. This is because the XBRL sheet could not get validated without mentioning atleast one  Promoter.</div> <div> </div> <div>Compulsorily Convertible Debentures (CCDs) were issued to entities belonging to the Promoter Group during the quarter ended September 2024. However'| these entities are not the existing Promoter/Promoter Group who are holding Equity Shares of the Company and accordingly'| the details of CCDs are not applicable to the existing Shareholding Pattern for the quarter ended 31st December'| 2024.</div></div></div>
Description: Disclosure of notes on shareholding pattern explanatory

Label: DisclosureOfNotesInCaseOfPromoterHolidingInDematerialsedFormIsLessThan100PercentageExplanatoryTextBlock
Value: <div> <div> <p>In the 'No. of equity shares held in dematerialized form' column'| we have mentioned zero for FDRT Consultancy Services Limited and Nu Business Ventures Private Limited due to the following reasons:</p> <p>The Board of Directors'| at their meeting held on February 13'| 2025'| approved the allotment of equity shares upon the conversion of Compulsorily Convertible Debentures. The Company will proceed with the listing and trading application for the allotted shares'| followed by the necessary corporate action by the Depository/RTA. Subsequently'| the shares will be credited to the respective Demat accounts. The Company confirms that the allotment was made exclusively in Demat form.</p></div></div>
Description: Disclosure of notes in case of promoter holiding in dematerialsed form is less than 100 percentage
